metadata.description: A curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills for enhanced development workflows

plugins.name: devloop
plugins.description: Lightweight development workflow with plan/run/fresh pattern, git workflow integration (branch-per-plan, PR creation, PR feedback), on-demand skills, and specialized agents. Optimized for efficiency with minimal hooks and direct execution.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Hybrid security scanner: deterministic SAST tools (Semgrep, Gitleaks, Trivy) for detection, LLM for triage. Reproducible findings, provenance-labeled [Static]/[LLM], zero-dependency fallback mode, CWE-specialized false positive elimination.

plugins.name: ctx
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code agents. Stores decisions, patterns, and knowledge in a structured graph database across sessions with auto-injection and enforcement.

plugins.name: wsl-clipboard-fix
plugins.description: Fixes image pasting in WSL2 by auto-converting BMP clipboard content to PNG. Runs a background clip2png daemon that monitors the Wayland clipboard during Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: blog-writer
plugins.description: Conversational blog post creator that interviews you about your topic, captures your writing voice, drafts in your style, strips AI tells, and publishes as markdown or HTML.
